mapper.insert: INSERT INTO orders (order_number, order_type, total_price) VALUES ('0', #{orderType}, #{totalPrice})
INSERT INTO order_items (order_id, menu_id, quantity, price_at_order) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{menuId}, #{quantity}, #{price})
mapper.select: SELECT price FROM menus WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
SELECT option_price FROM options WHERE option_id = #{optionId}
